claim: Alpamayo is first open reasoning model for autonomous vehicles (10B parameters), designed for rare scenario reasoning with low latency
actionable: For autonomous systems requiring chain-of-thought reasoning at inference time, evaluate Alpamayo as open-source alternative

claim: NeMo Tron speech ASR model designed for low-latency streaming by maintaining cache to avoid recomputing audio frames
actionable: For real-time voice agents, use NeMo Tron speech with caching instead of Whisper to reduce compute waste

claim: Previous streaming models waste compute by processing same audio frames multiple times; NeMo Tron avoids redundant computation
actionable: When building streaming speech systems, use models with state management (caching) to reduce computational overhead

claim: NeMo Tron multimodal RAG models support vision + text embeddings, expanding RAG beyond text-only approaches
actionable: For multimodal document RAG (PDFs with images, diagrams), use NeMo Tron multimodal embeddings instead of text-only models

claim: NVIDIA focus at CES 2026 was on developer/hyperscaler tools and models, not consumer GPU hardware
actionable: Track NVIDIA releases separately for data center vs consumer; focus on developer models and tools when building infrastructure
